svg.text: B2B Order-to-Cash Platform · SAP BTP · S/4HANA · Integration Suite · Snowflake
Self-service API Keys · Dev Portal · Playground
Customer Approval · API Key Review · Order Monitoring
PRESENTATION LAYER — React SPA on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry / Kyma)
● Product Catalog — Unsplash/Picsum images by category
● Order Placement — POST to S/4HANA via iFlow
● Order History & Status — reads from Snowflake
● API Catalog — OpenAPI specs via Redoc/Swagger UI
● API Key Manager — request · view · revoke keys
● API Playground — live sandbox wired to backend
● Onboarding Wizard — register → API key → first call
● Usage Metrics — requests today / limit per key
● Orders — cross-customer view with status filter
● API Keys — approve / reject / view issued keys
React 18 + TypeScript · React Router v6 · Tanstack Query · SAP UI5 Web Components · Vite · Hosted on BTP (CF static / Kyma nginx)
ADMIN_SECRET env var · requireAdmin middleware · sessionStorage
SAP INTEGRATION SUITE — API MANAGEMENT GATEWAY
BACKEND API — Node.js / Express on SAP BTP (Kyma)
Single source of truth · All write operations · Fallback reads
Portal/DevPortal → JWT Bearer (OAuth2 Client Credentials via SAP IAS)
